# A Vindication Of The Rights Of Woman

by
    Wollstonecraft, Mary, 1759-1797

Publication date
    1792
Topics Collection
    bell\_politics-government ; bell

    English
Item Size
    293\.0M

Mary Wollstonecraft was a famous 18th century feminist and social advocate. In this essay, she argues for basic gender equality and education, going so far as to call forced reliance on men during that time a form of legal prostitution. _Vindication_ is a must-read for anyone interested in gender studies, women's rights or the gendered evolution of education or basic rights.  
  
Suggested Level: US (Upper Secondary)
